programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie tries to guilt Robert and Ray into helping her with a shelf project. The brothers band together to resist her, and go to get a prime spot on a golf course. Season finale. (S8, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where It All Began: After Rachel leaves her fiancé at the altar, she moves in with Monica and finds that life isn't so easy without Daddy's credit cards. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Sonogram At The End: Ross's lesbian ex-wife is pregnant with his child, and he doesn't like her choice of a last name for the baby. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A soda company gives Phoebe $7,000 after she finds a dismembered thumb in a can of soda. Meanwhile, Chandler is smoking again, to his friends' dismay. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Ross mourns the anniversary of losing his virginity to Carol, the boys convince him to go to a hockey game which leads to an unfortunate incident. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The East German Laundry Detergent: Ross helps Rachel do laundry and considers the evening a first date. Meanwhile, Joey has Monica pose as his new girlfriend. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey gets his big film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Meanwhile, Chandler has a relationship with all the "fun" but none of the responsibility. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When New York has a blackout, the gang return to the girls' apartment, where Ross tries to tell Rachel he likes her. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Nana Dies Twice: Monica and Ross mourn the death of their grandmother. Meanwhile, Chandler questions his sexuality after his work colleagues set him up on a date with a man. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Underdog Gets Away: Monica's first Thanksgiving dinner for the gang burns, when they all run to the rooftop to see the runaway Underdog balloon from the parade. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang makes, then breaks, a pact to celebrate New Year's Eve without dates. Ross compensates for his loneliness by getting a roommate... a monkey named Marcel. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Bing: Chandler's romance-novelist mother comes to New York to visit, but her promiscuity, combined with an emotional Ross, results in a regretful moment of passion. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler accidentally sees Rachel wandering around topless after her shower, so Rachel tries to even the score... (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Stoned Guy: Monica cooks a gourmet meal for a restaurateur looking for a new chef. However, there's one problem... he's a little "baked" himself. (S1, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With Two Parts (1): Joey falls for Phoebe's twin sister, making Phoebe feel neglected and Ross has doubts about parenthood when he attends Lamaze classes with Carol and Susan. (S1, E.

programme.title: The Naked Gun... Police Squad!

programme.desc: Revenge and Remorse (The Guilty Alibi): The show that spawned the Naked Gun franchise. After a judge is blown up by an exploding gavel, Frank's investigation soon leads to an old adversary. (S1, E.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: It's mayhem as they work as mall janitors with an out-of-control trash can, and then devising a plan of revenge. Two Jokers lost this episode, and will be getting a refill of a lifetime.

programme.title: Russell Howard: Wonderbox - Uncut
